name: evaluate_mastery
description: Evaluate a student's mastery of a single knowledge point. Given current MasteryState, SM-2 schedule, recent attempts, and intervention history, returns a recommended MasteryState transition (optional) and an SM-2 adjustment (optional). The handler validates the suggestion and writes to Memory; this Skill does not mutate state.

kpName.description: Human-readable knowledge point name (for reasoning context)

currentMasteryStatus.description: The student's current MasteryState status for this KP

reviewSchedule.description: Current SM-2 schedule for this KP

recentAttempts.description: Completed DailyTask results for this KP over the last 7 days, most recent first

interventionHistory.description: Most recent 5 InterventionHistory records for this KP

masterySpeed.description: Rolling correct rate over recent attempts (0..1). Below 0.5 signals a struggling learner.

currentWorkload.description: Count of pending DailyTasks today. Used as a signal for whether interval can be stretched.

examProximityDays.description: Days until the next exam, if known. Caps the suggested interval.
